_README: anchor=[x,y,z] OBJECT frame (m); approach_dir=[x,y,z] OBJECT-frame unit approach axis (optional); width=preferred gripper qpos-sum (m). Mined by tools/build_affordances.py from robot_success_states/<robot>/<subtask>/<obj_id>.pkl. One component is stored per usable success grasp pose, keyed by canonical MS-HAB obj_id (no 'env-N_' prefix, no '-N' instance suffix).
